channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Prime Day Tablet Deals Are Live: 25+ Offers to Grab Right Now
item.description: Massive discounts on iPads and Samsung Galaxy Tabs are available now. Don't miss out on these Prime Day tablet deals!

item.title: Warhammer 40,000 Devs Announce And Roll Back Launcher In 24 Hours
item.description: Owlcat Games quickly retracted its new PC launcher announcement after backlash. The decision sparked nearly 2000 comments without any likes.

item.title: Prime Day Brings Seriously Deep Dell Deals With 33% Off Top Desktops, Laptops, and More
item.description: Dell and Alienware are offering steep discounts on desktops and laptops for Prime Day. Don't miss these limited-time deals!

item.title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban
item.description: Meta introduces $299 smart glasses featuring updated AI and customizable designs. Privacy improvements are also on the way.

item.title: Here’s how your phone is running after updating to Android 17
item.description: Most users report stable performance after updating to Android 17. Minimal bugs have been noted in the latest update.

item.title: The 30 Best Nintendo Prime Day Deals — Hand-Picked by Our Deals Experts
item.description: Experts have curated the best Nintendo Switch 2 deals for Prime Day 2026. Great bundles and accessories are available now.

item.title: Exclusive | Rare $18.5M NYC townhouse finds a cash buyer in 3 weeks
item.description: A rare NYC townhouse sold for $18.5 million in just three weeks. The all-cash deal highlights the competitive real estate market.

item.title: Minecraft 26.3 Snapshot 1
item.description: Minecraft's new forest biome is now in testing. Players can explore an abandoned camp and discover hidden loot.

item.title: What Owners Say Is The Biggest Problem With Foldable Phones
item.description: Foldable phone users cite hinge durability and battery life as major concerns. The unique aspect ratio also poses challenges.

item.title: Continental releases Tour de France tyres including exclusive 'transparent' Aero 111
item.description: Continental launches a limited edition tyre set for the Tour de France. The set includes an exclusive Aero 111 front tyre.

item.title: The Google Pixel 10 Pro Drops to Its Lowest Price Ever for Amazon Prime Day, But Stock Is Limited
item.description: The Google Pixel 10 Pro is now available for $799 during Prime Day. Stock is limited, so act fast!

item.title: Marvel's Wolverine Actor Confirms Role in GTA 6
item.description: Actors confirm roles in Grand Theft Auto VI, including Marvel's Wolverine star. Excitement builds for the upcoming game.

item.title: Judge agrees to set aside default entered against Jon Prosser in Apple lawsuit
item.description: Jon Prosser receives a chance to respond to Apple's lawsuit regarding iOS 26 leaks. The legal battle continues.

item.title: New supply chain report claims the iPhone Ultra will be unveiled as scheduled
item.description: Despite previous delay reports, the iPhone Ultra is expected to launch on time. Supply chain sources confirm the schedule.

item.title: Prime Day 2026 LIVE: all the top TV, soundbar and projector deals handpicked by our home cinema experts
item.description: Experts are curating the best Prime Day AV deals in real-time. Stay updated on the latest offers for TVs and sound systems.
